overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned Soviet-era kindergarten in a video game. The player walks through a dilapidated upper-floor corridor with broken windows overlooking brutalist apartment buildings, descends a dark concrete stairwell, and approaches a ground floor exit. The atmosphere is bleak and overcast with cool blue-gray tones and peeling paint throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned kindergarten upper corridor with broken windows

events.description: text overlay 'Friendship Kindergarten' appears at bottom of screen indicating location
camera briefly pans right to look out window at distant apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: walking slowly down the debris-filled corridor, occasionally glancing at the windows

entered.detail: blue-gray wall with extensive peeling paint and water damage
tall rectangular windows with broken panes showing overcast exterior
dilapidated beige sofa against the left wall
cardboard box sitting in the middle of the debris-covered floor
tall concrete apartment blocks visible through the windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a narrow, debris-filled corridor of an abandoned building. Peeling blue-gray paint covers the walls, and broken windows on the right reveal overcast skies and distant brutalist architecture. A small sofa and cardboard box sit among the rubble on the floor.

events.description: turns left from corridor into dark stairwell landing area
begins descending the concrete stairs into lower levels

agents.ego_description: turning into the stairwell and carefully descending the dark concrete steps

entered.detail: metal pipe railing along the edge of the stairwell
worn concrete steps leading downward into darkness
small landing area at the top of the stairs with a pink cabinet visible

segments.scene_description: The player turns left from the corridor into a dark concrete stairwell. Metal railings line the edges of the worn concrete steps as the camera descends deeper into the building. The lighting grows progressively darker, and a pink cabinet is visible on the upper landing before the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor corridor approaching exterior exit

events.description: approaches ground floor exit doorway with view of overgrown outdoor area

agents.ego_description: moving toward the exit doorway to transition from interior to exterior

entered.detail: open doorway leading to the exterior with bright overcast light visible
abandoned outdoor area with dead grass and overgrown vegetation visible through exit

segments.scene_description: Having reached the bottom of the stairs, the player moves through a short ground floor corridor toward an open exit. Bright overcast light streams in from the doorway, revealing an overgrown courtyard outside as the camera approaches the building's exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dilapidated upper-floor corridor down into the depths of a building before emerging into an overgrown courtyard. It begins by moving through a narrow hallway filled with debris and peeling blue-gray paint, where broken windows offer a glimpse of distant brutalist architecture under an overcast sky. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts into a dark concrete stairwell, descending past a pink cabinet and metal railings as the lighting grows progressively dimmer. The movement then leads through a short ground floor corridor, where the oppressive shadows give way to bright, natural light streaming from an open doorway. Finally, the camera approaches the exit, transitioning from the bleak interior to the greenery of the exterior courtyard.
